name: The Conspirators - Scary True Stories From History

episodes.title: Strangest Plot Twist Ever. Real Life Cult Horror Story. The Kurim Case.
episodes.description:
In 2007, a quiet Czech town called Kurim became the center of one of the most bizarre and horrifying true stories you will ever hear. 

It started with a man seeing something unspeakable on a baby monitor. It would lead to a story involving a web of abuse, strange cult activity and one of the most shocking plot twists ever. 

Podcast: 
https://open.spotify.com/show/1IrYiMw...
